idea-plugin.name: Copy with inline issues for AI
idea-plugin.description:
Your JetBrains IDE runs world-class static code analysis as you type — type checks, data-flow analysis, semantic validation, and language-aware inspections. When you paste code into ChatGPT, Claude, or Cursor, all of that intelligence is lost. The AI sees plain text.

Copy with inline issues for AI captures every error, warning, and inspection result your IDE has already computed and inlines them as language-aware comments — ready to paste anywhere. The AI sees what your IDE sees.

How it works

  1. Select code in the editor, or right-click a file in the project tree
  2. Choose Copy with inline issues from the context menu
  3. Paste into ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Cursor, or any AI tool — errors and warnings included

Key features

  • Powered by your IDE's static analysis — Leverages JetBrains' inspection engine: syntax validation, type inference, data-flow analysis, and semantic checks
  • AI-Ready Output — Paste directly into ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor, or any LLM for instant debugging help
  • Copy Selection or Entire File — Works from the editor (selection) and project tree (full file)
  • Multi-Language — Java, Kotlin, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, PHP, C/C++, C#, Go, Ruby, Rust, SQL, HTML, CSS, YAML, and more
  • Comprehensive Detection — Captures syntax errors, semantic issues, and inspection warnings
  • Language-Aware Comments — Automatically uses the correct comment syntax for each language
  • Background processing — Detection runs off the EDT; no more IDE freezes on large files
  • Configurable severity filter — Choose which issues to include

Supported languages

Java, Kotlin, JS, TS, C/C++, C#, Go, Rust// ERROR: message
Python, Ruby, Shell, YAML# ERROR: message
SQL, Lua, Haskell-- ERROR: message
HTML, XML<!-- ERROR: message -->
CSS/* ERROR: message */

Works with

IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, PyCharm, PhpStorm, GoLand, CLion, Rider, DataGrip, and all JetBrains IDEs.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 1.2.1

  • Fixed crash — Settings no longer throw Cannot resolve $PRODUCT_WORKSPACE_FILE$ on first access. Settings are stored in a dedicated config file.
  • Removed deprecated API usage — Restored the non-deprecated read-action API that was accidentally reintroduced in 1.2.0.
  • Lower resource usage — Programmatic inspections are now skipped when the IDE Daemon already has highlights for the file, restoring v1.1.x performance.

Version 1.2.0

  • Settings page — New "Copy with Inline Issues" settings in Preferences → Tools
  • Background task — Detection now runs off the EDT with a progress indicator. No more IDE freezes.
  • Faster detection — Detection runs once per file instead of once per line. Significant speedup for large files.
  • Severity filter — Choose which severity levels to include (errors, warnings, weak warnings, info/hints)

action.description: Copy selected code with associated errors and warnings as comments
Copy entire file content with associated errors and warnings as comments
